Class SGDMomentum

java.lang.Object
org.DeepJ.ann.optimisers.SGDMomentum
All Implemented Interfaces:
Optimizer, ParameterOptimizer
public class SGDMomentum extends Object implements Optimizer, ParameterOptimizer
SGD with momentum. Keeps a separate velocity tensor per parameter.
